## What changed

<!-- Describe the platform, plugin, schema, or catalog change. -->

## Verification

- [ ] Relevant typecheck passes
- [ ] Relevant tests pass
- [ ] Production build passes
- [ ] No credentials, personal data, or camera frames are included
- [ ] User-facing and repository-facing copy is English

## Game Showcase submissions only

- [ ] The game is published at a public HTTPS ChatGPT Sites URL
- [ ] `/.well-known/manse-game.json` is reachable and valid
- [ ] The manifest links to a public source repository and license
- [ ] Asset provenance and content disclosures are complete
- [ ] The game was created from or is compatible with a supported Manse engine version
- [ ] The submitted catalog change contains only the manifest URL
